revision.comment: 曖昧さ回避化
revision.text:
'''白皇神社'''（しらおうじんじゃ / はくおうじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)]] - 高知県四万十市西土佐江川鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十市双海)]] - 高知県四万十市双海鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)]] - 高知県高岡郡四万十町八千数（はっせんずう）鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)]] - 高知県高岡郡四万十町宮内鎮座 *白皇神社 (土佐清水市) - 高知県土佐清水市[[白皇山]]山頂に鎮座していた神社 ⇒ [[白山神社 (土佐清水市)]] *[[白皇神社 (黒潮町)]] - 高知県幡多郡黒潮町田野浦鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Shiraō Shrine''' (白皇神社 / 白王神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]].
* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[ja:白皇神社]]

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] <!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Shiraō Shrine]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:dd]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine]][[en:draft:Shiraō Shrine]][[ja:白皇神社]]

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)|12=draft}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)|12=draft}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)|12=draft}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)|12=draft}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)|12=draft}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)|12=draft}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)|12=draft}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)|12=draft}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}

2 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:白皇神社 up to rev 41195344
revision.text:
'''白皇神社'''（しらおうじんじゃ / はくおうじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)]] - 高知県四万十市西土佐江川鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十市双海)]] - 高知県四万十市双海鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)]] - 高知県高岡郡四万十町八千数（はっせんずう）鎮座 *[[白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)]] - 高知県高岡郡四万十町宮内鎮座 *白皇神社 (土佐清水市) - 高知県土佐清水市[[白皇山]]山頂に鎮座していた神社 ⇒ [[白山神社 (土佐清水市)]] *[[白皇神社 (黒潮町)]] - 高知県幡多郡黒潮町田野浦鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[白皇神社]] to [[Shiraō Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|1=Hakusan Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11579593}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.

* {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市西土佐江川)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nishitosa Egawa, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十市双海)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Futami, Shimanto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Futami, Shimanto City, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町八千数)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Hassenzū, Shimanto Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hassenzū (八千数), Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja|白皇神社 (四万十町宮内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Miyauchi, Shimanto Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Miyauchi, Shimanto Town, Takaoka District, Kōchi Prefecture. * Shiraō Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City) - Formerly located at the summit of Mount Shiraō (白皇山), Tosa-Shimizu City, Kōchi Prefecture ⇒ {{ill|Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|ja|白山神社 (土佐清水市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine (Tosa-Shimizu City)|1=Hakusan Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11579593}}. * {{ill|Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja|白皇神社 (黒潮町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraō Shrine (Kuroshio Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tanoura, Kuroshio Town, Hata District, Kōchi Prefecture.
